name: Basic Quick Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Divide the flour mixture and shortening into two parts.
3. Cut 1 cup of shortening into half of the flour mixture using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
4. Repeat with the remaining shortening and flour mixture.
5. Combine both mixtures.
6. Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 weeks.
7. Refrigerate or freeze for longer storage.
